summary: Second iteration testing completed for ChinaStudy intermediation platform modifications. All requested changes implemented and working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: All 25 API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Document types endpoint returns exactly 14 types (including 9 bulletin slots)
Multiple diploma uploads working without replacing previous uploads
Application wizard now has exactly 6 steps (university step removed)
Contacts step: WhatsApp field removed, phone with country code selector implemented
Emergency contact: Nom/Prénom split implemented, 'Autre' precision field working
Financial guarantor: Nom/Prénom split and profession field implemented
Family step: Father and mother have separate Nom/Prénom fields
Admin dashboard shows students with university assignments
Admin student detail page has university assignment functionality
Document vault structure updated with diploma and bulletin sections
Backend correctly rejects university step updates (step removed from valid steps)
New phone field structure (phone_code + phone_number) working in all forms
Emergency contact relationship 'Autre' shows precision field correctly
All form validations and navigation working properly

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all major flows and UI changes tested successfully)
